opportunities.why_this_fits: Touchpoint Foundation has a track record of supporting organizations like Senior Network Services. Their top funding state is CA (94% of grants), matching your location. Notably, SENIOR COASTSIDERS INC received $15,000 in 2023 for: UNRESTRICTED GENERAL SUPPORT FOR SENIOR SERVICES
opportunities.positioning_strategy: Lead with an unrestricted operating support request—100% of their grants are general support. Consider requesting $4,000 - $7,500 based on their $5,000 median grant. Apply via: https://touchpointfoundation.org/grant-guidelines

next_steps.action: Call Touchpoint Foundation at 650-599-7407 to inquire about application process
Research Touchpoint Foundation's recent grants and stated priorities
Draft Letter of Inquiry highlighting alignment with foundation priorities
Identify potential board or staff connections for warm introduction

opportunities.why_this_fits: ARCHSTONE FOUNDATION has a track record of supporting organizations like Senior Network Services. As a CA-based foundation with 90% in-state giving, they prioritize local organizations. Notably, UNIVERSITY OF SOUTHERN CALIFORNIA LEONARD DAVIS SCHOOL OF GERONTOLOGY received $90,000 in 2022 for: CROSSING THE DIGITAL DIVIDE: LEARNING FROM A PILOT PROGRAM WITH LOW INCOME UNDERSERVED OLDER ADULTS
opportunities.positioning_strategy: Frame your request around a specific program or initiative, as this foundation favors program-specific grants (70%). Consider requesting $8,000 - $15,000 based on their $10,000 median grant. Emphasize your local CA presence and community impact.
